geography.data_source: GHMC ward map 2020, Secunderabad Cantonment Board boundary, SCB and GHMC zone overlap areas

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Secunderabad (part of Hyderabad district) tables, Cantonment Board population estimates, military family demographics

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round (2020-21) Telangana urban tables, PLFS 2022-23, adjusted for Secunderabad's military + government employment concentration, Cantonment Board employment records

commute_profile.data_source: HMR ridership data 2023, MMTS (Multi-Modal Transport System) suburban rail Secunderabad line data, Secunderabad railway station as major junction

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Estimated from government zone behaviour, higher institutional trust due to military/government worker concentration, lower political mobilisation due to service rules, Lokniti-CSDS 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from cantonment social patterns, military colony networks, government quarter residential networks

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Secunderabad railway station daily passenger count (South Central Railway), station area commercial activity estimates
Estimated from Secunderabad General Bazaar/RP Road commercial strip activity
Cantonment Board market area, lower footfall due to restricted access in cantonment zones

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: Adjusted Government Zone template for Secunderabad's military cantonment character — reduced government_employee from 0.42 to 0.35, added formal sector for railway/commercial employment, increased retired for military retirees

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from Secunderabad Cantonment Board structure, South Central Railway zonal office, GHMC ward representation
